violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Food employee did not have a restraint for her long hair. Hair should be properly restrained in food preparation areas.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Bottom of the reach-in cooler upstairs was found dirty. Cooler should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Range and counter top downstairs were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in cooler floor was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
